task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo Calendar application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen, showing a daily, weekly, or monthly calendar view.

task_completion.description: Open the event creation form or modal
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new event creation popup or full-page form is open, ready for input.
The Meeting Subject or Event Name field contains the text 'Department All-Hands'.

task_completion.description: Set the meeting time to 2:00 PM (14:00) for 1 hour on the first Monday of the upcoming month
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time is set to 14:00 (or 02:00 PM), the duration is 1 hour (or end time is 15:00/03:00 PM), and the starting date is selected as the first Monday of the next month.

task_completion.description: Enable recurrence and set it to repeat monthly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recurrent' checkbox is checked, and the recurrence frequency is set to 'Monthly' (e.g., 'Repeat Every 1 Months').

task_completion.description: Configure the recurrence to fall on the 'First Monday' of the month
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recurrence settings specify repeating on the 'First Monday' of the month (often selected via radio buttons or dropdowns choosing 'Day of week' rather than a specific 'Date of month').

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to create the event
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Odoo web elements (buttons, forms, dropdowns) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL shows the correct localhost address (http://localhost:8069) and the standard Odoo interface is visible, not a text editor or mock environment.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by pasting scripts into the browser console
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser developer tools/console being used to inject JavaScript or API calls to create the event.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The event name must be exactly 'Department All-Hands'. The start time must be 14:00 (2:00 PM) with 0 minutes. The recurrence must be set to 'monthly', specifically configured by day (not date) to fall on the 'First Monday' (represented internally as BYDAY=1MO).
